ddls:
CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset (e.g., PEFA) */,
  "iso3" TEXT /* ISO3 code representing the country */,
  "subset" TEXT /* Subset of the data (e.g., All) */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the data collection */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the dataset */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Data quality rating (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update date of the dataset */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the dataset (e.g., active, archived) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "indicators" (
  "indicator_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the indicator */,
  "indicator_name" TEXT /* Name of the indicator (e.g., PI-1 Public) */,
  "indicator_type" TEXT /* Type of the indicator (e.g., performance, compliance) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the indicator */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the indicator */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of data collection */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the indicator definition */,
  "relevance" TEXT /* Relevance rating (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "questions" (
  "question_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each question */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the related dataset */,
  "indicator_id" TEXT /* Reference to the related indicator */,
  "question_text" TEXT /* Text of the question regarding the expenditure */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the question */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the question */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Creation date of the question */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last update date of the question */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("question_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_questions_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_questions_indicator_id FOREIGN KEY ("indicator_id") REFERENCES indicators ("indicator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "answers" (
  "answer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each answer */,
  "question_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the related question */,
  "answer_text" TEXT /* Text of the answer */,
  "value" REAL /* Numerical value of the answer */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who provided the answer */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Creation date of the answer */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last update date of the answer */,
  "source_document" TEXT /* Reference to supporting documentation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("answer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_answers_question_id FOREIGN KEY ("question_id") REFERENCES questions ("question_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "groups" (
  "group_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each group */,
  "group_name" TEXT /* Name of the group (e.g., PI-1, PI-2) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the group */,
  "parent_group_id" TEXT /* Parent group ID for hierarchical structure */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the group */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Creation date of the group */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last update date of the group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_groups_parent_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_group_id") REFERENCES groups ("group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "values" (
  "value_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the value entry */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the dataset */,
  "indicator_id" TEXT /* Reference to the indicator */,
  "value" REAL /* Numerical value for the indicator in the dataset */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the value entry */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Creation date of the value entry */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last update date of the value entry */,
  "source_document" TEXT /* Reference to supporting documentation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("value_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_values_indicator_id FOREIGN KEY ("indicator_id") REFERENCES indicators ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_values_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, analyst) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Creation date of the user account */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the dataset */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset being accessed */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the access event */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Creation date of the access log entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
